description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set within a landscaped urban lot, featuring clean geometric lines and a flat roof. The property includes a spacious driveway, a carport, and a swimming pool surrounded by a patio area. The house is surrounded by lush greenery, including several mature trees and manicured hedges, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and a pathway leading from the driveway. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, contemporary materials, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, swimming pool, and landscaped gardens, featuring clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, carport, and a row of trees providing privacy along the property edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, covered porch, swimming pool, and landscaped garden with a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear garden, additional parking area, and more trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the garden area, rear patio, and the arrangement of trees and hedges behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a wide main door, steps leading up, and a landscaped pathway flanked by greenery
